title: Expose proposal ticket linkage and source audit in native inspectors
summary: Extend the native macOS proposal inspectors so repo-backed change proposals show linked HS tickets, surface a truthful read-only source audit, and stop relying on hardcoded parity copy for the most visible proposal-related narratives.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal artifacts parse and expose linked HS ticket ids when proposal markdown references them.
The native proposal workspace and proposal detail inspector show linked ticket context directly.
Read-only apply preview includes a truthful source audit summary instead of only coverage and evidence-match status.
The most visible proposal-adjacent hardcoded parity copy moves into StudioStrings and localized string catalog truth.
The native macOS app still builds after the inspector and localization changes.

evidence.note: This slice focuses on moving proposal-to-ticket linkage and apply audit truth from repo-only workflow tooling into the native product surface.
Whitespace and patch hygiene checks passed for the native proposal linkage slice.
The macOS native workspace builds successfully after the proposal inspector changes.

trigger.source_ref: Continuation of HumbleStudio native proposal and inspector truth work after repo workflow onboarding.

agent_notes: This slice reads linked HS ticket ids from proposal markdown but does not invent or auto-assign them during proposal save.
The next likely proposal step is a deeper read-only apply audit against concrete repository files and target mappings.
